short_summary: Kristina Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (née Perez; born June 4, 1988) is an American politician. A member of the Democratic Party, she has been the United States representative for Washington's 3rd congressional district since 2023. She is a co-chair of the Blue Dog Coalition.

prior_positions.position: Co-Chair of the Blue Dog Coalition for Administration
Co-Chair of the Blue Dog Coalition for Communications
